title: lithocarpus zschokkei
intro: Lithocarpus zschokkei, also known as the Chinese copper beech, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Fagaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The extracts of Lithocarpus zschokkei have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. Lithocarpus zschokkei is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and its bark and leaves can be used to make herbal tea or tinctures.
